findings.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence: Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.52 (foreground color: #6bb09c, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1 [4 manufacturing facilities]; Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.52 (foreground color: #6bb09c, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1 [largest Product Supply footprint]; Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.52 (foreground color: #6bb09c, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1 [diabetes and obesity medications] (and 3 more)

findings.description: Duplicated content on the Circular for Zero – Energy and Water Goals section. The project savings bullet points appear twice in the HTML: once as part of the structured numbered list (item 2. Project savings) and again immediately below a Circular for Zero icon image.
findings.evidence: PDF page 9 shows the text 'Novo Nordisk has a goal of 2% energy and water reduction through projects' and 'These projects can be dedicated for savings, process improvements, equipment maintenance or configuration adjustments, among others' only once. In the HTML, these same sentences appear first under '2. Project savings' sub-bullets, then are repeated below the C4Z icon in a second set of bullets, disrupting reading flow.

findings.description: Fabricated table column headers in the 'Novo Nordisk at a glance' section. The PDF presents this content as an infographic-style layout without categorical column labels, but the HTML invents new text for table headers.
findings.evidence: HTML headers: "Market & Supply", "Financials & Footprint", "Research & Production", "Therapy Areas". None of these phrases appear anywhere in the source PDF.

findings.description: Fabricated table column headers in the 'Novo Nordisk Product Supply in North Carolina & Virginia' section. The PDF presents this content as a visual grid/infographic, not a categorized table.
findings.evidence: HTML headers: "Manufacturing & Investment", "Awards & Sustainability", "Community & Expansion". None of these phrases appear anywhere in the source PDF.

findings.description: Baseline Electricity Consumption pie chart data is presented both as an embedded image and as a separate HTML bulleted list with the same percentage breakdowns.

findings.description: Three small circular photographs on PDF page 7 (accompanying the three CO₂ emission reduction targets: sustainability scene, renewable power, transport) are missing from the HTML. Only the city/wind turbine line art illustration is included.
findings.evidence: PDF page 7 shows three circular photos next to 'Net Zero emissions by 2045', 'All supply based on 100% renewable power by 2030', and 'Zero CO₂ from own operations and transport by 2030'. The HTML section 'Must-win challenge to reduce CO₂ emissions' has only one for the line art illustration and a text-only table for the targets.

findings.description: The LEED Gold certification seal image from PDF page 4 is not present as a standalone image in the HTML. The certification is only referenced in text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 shows the U.S. Green Building Council LEED Gold seal/badge image. The HTML mentions 'Gold LEED Certified on all API buildings' in text but does not include a corresponding for the seal.
